items.prompt: For a full command manual, you usually run…
items.explain: man opens the manual page for a command.

items.prompt: A quick reminder of flags is often…
items.explain: Many commands print a short usage summary with --help.

items.prompt: apropos searches for commands by keyword in their descriptions.
items.explain: apropos (and man -k) match keywords against short descriptions.

choices: A one-line summary of a command
items.explain: whatis prints a short one-line description when the database is available.
